articles.author: Kennedy French
articles.title: Only Half of Americans Went to a Movie Theater in 2025, According to Pew Study - variety.com
articles.description: Only 53% of Americans say they went to a movie theater over 12 months ending in summer 2025, according to a Pew Research study.
articles.content: With the Academy Awards approaching to celebrate the year’s best films, a new survey offered a reality check about moviegoing: Just over half of Americans say they set foot in a movie theater over th… [+2283 chars]
